title: phaenopyrum tournefortii
intro: Phaenopyrum tournefortii, also known as the Tree of Heaven or Ailanthus, is a deciduous tree native to China and Southeast Asia, known for its distinctive, pinnate leaves and its ability to thrive in poor soil conditions. The medicinal properties of Phaenopyrum tournefortii are attributed to its bark, leaves, and roots, which contain flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids that have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Phaenopyrum tournefortii include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. In traditional Chinese medicine, Phaenopyrum tournefortii is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal formulations to support respiratory and digestive health.
